notes: 3.11.08 — TU DIEN ID + MAT KHAU khi mo app (yeu cau Sep): (1) Sau dang nhap thanh cong (ca nhanh 2FA), app moi Chrome/Edge LUU MAT KHAU qua Credential Management API — MK nam trong trinh quan ly mat khau cua trinh duyet (ma hoa theo tai khoan HDH), app KHONG luu mat khau tran (giu nguyen tac AES-256 tu mat khau). (2) Nho ID dang nhap gan nhat cua may (localStorage, khong phai bi mat) — mo app tu dien o ID va focus thang o mat khau; trinh duyet da luu MK thi tu dien not, NV chi bam Dang nhap. (3) Them name=username/password cho input de autofill nhan dien chac hon. Firefox: khong ho tro PasswordCredential — van tu dien ID, MK theo trinh duyet. Verify: node --check PASS. Gom 3.10.42-3.11.07. Rollback=3.10.41.
